title: Looking for Teacher at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd:
NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
